talents.name: Improved Eviscerate
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your Eviscerate ability by 5%.

talents.name: Remorseless Attacks
talents.description: After killing an opponent that yields experience or honor, gives you a 20% increased critical strike chance on your next Sinister Strike, Hemorrhage, Backstab, Mutilate, Ambush, or Ghostly Strike. Lasts 20 sec.

talents.name: Malice
talents.description: Increases your critical strike chance by 1%.

talents.name: Ruthlessness
talents.description: Gives your melee finishing moves a 20% chance to add a combo point to your target. (Proc chance: 20%)

talents.name: Murder
talents.description: Increases all damage caused against Humanoid, Giant, Beast and Dragonkin targets by 1%.

talents.name: Puncturing Wounds
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Backstab ability by 10%, and the critical strike chance of your Mutilate ability by 5%.

talents.name: Relentless Strikes
talents.description: Your finishing moves have a 20% chance per combo point to restore 25 energy.

talents.name: Improved Expose Armor
talents.description: Increases the armor reduced by your Expose Armor ability by 25%.

talents.name: Lethality
talents.description: Increases the critical strike damage bonus of your Sinister Strike, Gouge, Backstab, Ghostly Strike, Mutilate, Shiv, and Hemorrhage abilities by 6%.

talents.name: Vile Poisons
talents.description: Increases the damage dealt by your poisons and Envenom ability by 4% and gives your poisons an additional 8% chance to resist dispel effects.

talents.name: Improved Poisons
talents.description: Increases the chance to apply poisons to your target by 2%.

talents.name: Fleet Footed
talents.description: Increases your chance to resist movement impairing effects by 5% and increases your movement speed by 8%. This does not stack with other movement speed increasing effects.

talents.name: Cold Blood
talents.description: When activated, increases the critical strike chance of your next offensive ability by 100%.

talents.name: Improved Kidney Shot
talents.description: While affected by your Kidney Shot ability, the target receives an additional 3% damage from all sources.

talents.name: Quick Recovery
talents.description: All healing effects on you are increased by 10%. In addition, your finishing moves cost 40% less Energy when they fail to hit.

talents.name: Seal Fate
talents.description: Your critical strikes from abilities that add combo points have a 20% chance to add an additional combo point. (Proc chance: 20%, 500ms cooldown)

talents.name: Master Poisoner
talents.description: Reduces the chance your poisons will be resisted by 5% and increases your chance to resist Poison effects by an additional 15%.

talents.name: Vigor
talents.description: Increases your maximum Energy by 10.

talents.name: Deadened Nerves
talents.description: Decreases all physical damage taken by 1%.

talents.name: Find Weakness
talents.description: Your finishing moves increase the damage of all your offensive abilities by 2% for 10 sec.

talents.name: Mutilate
talents.description: Instantly attacks with both weapons for an additional 44 with each weapon. Damage is increased by 50% against Poisoned targets. Must be behind the target. Awards 2 combo points.

talents.name: Improved Gouge
talents.description: Increases the effect duration of your Gouge ability by 0.5 sec.

talents.name: Improved Sinister Strike
talents.description: Reduces the Energy cost of your Sinister Strike ability by 3.

talents.name: Lightning Reflexes
talents.description: Increases your Dodge chance by 1%.

talents.name: Improved Slice and Dice
talents.description: Increases the duration of your Slice and Dice ability by 15%.

talents.name: Deflection
talents.description: Increases your Parry chance by 1%.

talents.name: Precision
talents.description: Increases your chance to hit with weapons by 1%.

talents.name: Endurance
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Sprint and Evasion abilities by 45 sec.

talents.name: Riposte
talents.description: A strike that becomes active after parrying an opponent's attack. This attack deals 150% weapon damage and disarms the target for 6 sec.

talents.name: Improved Sprint
talents.description: Gives a 50% chance to remove all Movement Impairing effects when you activate your Sprint ability.

talents.name: Improved Kick
talents.description: Gives your Kick ability a 50% chance to silence the target for 2 sec. (Proc chance: 50%)

talents.name: Dagger Specialization
talents.description: Increases your chance to get a critical strike with Daggers by 1%.

talents.name: Dual Wield Specialization
talents.description: Increases the damage done by your offhand weapon by 10%.

talents.name: Mace Specialization
talents.description: Increases the damage dealt by your critical strikes with maces by 1%, and gives you a 1% chance to stun your target for 3 sec with a mace. (Proc chance: 1%)

talents.name: Blade Flurry
talents.description: Increases your attack speed by 20%. In addition, attacks strike an additional nearby opponent. Lasts 15 sec.

talents.name: Sword Specialization
talents.description: Gives you a 1% chance to get an extra attack on the same target after hitting your target with your Sword. (Proc chance: 1%, 500ms cooldown)

talents.name: Fist Weapon Specialization
talents.description: Increases your chance to get a critical strike with Fist Weapons by 1%.

talents.name: Blade Twisting
talents.description: Gives your Sinister Strike, Backstab, Gouge and Shiv abilities a 10% chance to Daze the target for 8 sec. (Proc chance: 10%)

talents.name: Weapon Expertise
talents.description: Increases your expertise by 5.

talents.name: Aggression
talents.description: Increases the damage of your Sinister Strike, Backstab, and Eviscerate abilities by 2%.

talents.name: Vitality
talents.description: Increases your total Stamina by 2% and your total Agility by 1%.

talents.name: Adrenaline Rush
talents.description: Increases your Energy regeneration rate by 100% for 15 sec.

talents.name: Nerves of Steel
talents.description: Increases your chance to resist Stun and Fear effects by an additional 5%.

talents.name: Combat Potency
talents.description: Gives your successful off-hand melee attacks a 20% chance to generate 3 Energy. (Proc chance: 20%)

talents.name: Surprise Attacks
talents.description: Your finishing moves can no longer be dodged, and the damage dealt by your Sinister Strike, Backstab, Shiv and Gouge abilities is increased by 10%.

talents.name: Master of Deception
talents.description: Reduces the chance enemies have to detect you while in Stealth mode.

talents.name: Opportunity
talents.description: Increases the damage dealt when striking from behind with your Backstab, Mutilate, Garrote and Ambush abilities by 4%.

talents.name: Sleight of Hand
talents.description: Reduces the chance you are critically hit by melee and ranged attacks by 1% and increases the threat reduction of your Feint ability by 10%.

talents.name: Dirty Tricks
talents.description: Increases the range of your Blind and Sap abilities by 2 yards and reduces the energy cost of your Blind and Sap abilities by 25%.

talents.name: Camouflage
talents.description: Increases your speed while stealthed by 3% and reduces the cooldown of your Stealth ability by 1 sec.

talents.name: Initiative
talents.description: Gives you a 25% chance to add an additional combo point to your target when using your Ambush, Garrote, or Cheap Shot ability.

talents.name: Ghostly Strike
talents.description: A strike that deals 125% weapon damage and increases your chance to dodge by 15% for 7 sec. Awards 1 combo point.

talents.name: Improved Ambush
talents.description: Increases the critical strike chance of your Ambush ability by 15%.

talents.name: Setup
talents.description: Gives you a 15% chance to add a combo point to your target after dodging their attack or fully resisting one of their spells. (Proc chance: 15%, 1s cooldown)

talents.name: Elusiveness
talents.description: Reduces the cooldown of your Vanish and Blind abilities by 45 sec.

talents.name: Serrated Blades
talents.description: Causes your attacks to ignore 0 of your target's Armor and increases the damage dealt by your Rupture ability by 10%. The amount of Armor reduced increases with your level.

talents.name: Heightened Senses
talents.description: Increases your Stealth detection and reduces the chance you are hit by spells and ranged attacks by 2%.

talents.name: Preparation
talents.description: When activated, this ability immediately finishes the cooldown on your Evasion, Sprint, Vanish, Cold Blood, Shadowstep and Premeditation abilities.

talents.name: Dirty Deeds
talents.description: Reduces the Energy cost of your Cheap Shot and Garrote abilities by 10. Additionally, your special abilities cause 10% more damage against targets below 35% health.

talents.name: Hemorrhage
talents.description: An instant strike that deals 110 / Sinister Calling : 111 / Sinister Calling : 112 / Sinister Calling : 113 / Sinister Calling : 114 % weapon damage and causes the target to hemorrhage, increasing any Physical damage dealt to the target by up to 13. Lasts 10 charges or 15 sec. Awards 1 combo point.

talents.name: Master of Subtlety
talents.description: Attacks made while stealthed and for 6 seconds after breaking stealth cause an additional 4% damage.

talents.name: Deadliness
talents.description: Increases your attack power by 2%.

talents.name: Enveloping Shadows
talents.description: Increases your chance to avoid area of effect attacks by an additional 5%.

talents.name: Premeditation
talents.description: When used, adds 2 combo points to your target. You must add to or use those combo points within 10 sec or the combo points are lost.

talents.name: Cheat Death
talents.description: You have a 33% chance that an attack which would otherwise kill you will instead reduce you to 10% of your maximum health. In addition, all damage taken will be reduced by up to 90% for 3 sec (modified by resilience). This effect cannot occur more than once per minute.

talents.name: Sinister Calling
talents.description: Increases your total Agility by 3% and increases the percentage damage bonus of Backstab and Hemorrhage by an additional 1%.

talents.name: Shadowstep
talents.description: Attempts to step through the shadows and reappear behind your enemy and increases movement speed by 70% for 3 sec. The damage of your next ability is increased by 20% and the threat caused is reduced by 50%. Lasts 10 sec.
